dungeon: GENUINE ROTF crate/potion-GRIND run — mostly the OPEN REALM (grass+desert) plus a grey-stone dungeon. Economy/unboxing heavy; NO boss taunts (grind video). Build value = SYSTEMS + ITEMS intel (crate→stat-pot economy, Potion Storage) + event-feed corroboration; not a source of new bosses/attacks.

bosses.note: DOCUMENTED: no boss FIGHT taunts (the run is crate/potion grinding). Bosses below are EVENT-FEED mentions only (base/event). Attack geometry not classifiable from the grey-room bossends.

drops: Orb of Sweet Demise (from Magical Crate)
Seal of the Enchanted Forest (from Magical Crate)
Potion of Vitality / Speed / Defense / Wisdom / Attack (stat pots, from crates)
event_bosses_seen_in_global_feed: Firebreather (Modnus announcer: 'Firebreather has just been defeated/spawned')
Cube God (Mommy announcer: 'Cube God has just spawned!')
mechanics: DOCUMENTED ROTF ECONOMY SYSTEMS (high value): CRATE-OPENING -> stat pots + items ('You have opened a crate! Obtaining a Potion of X'; Magical Crate yields Orb of Sweet Demise / Seal of the Enchanted Forest). MAX-TRACKING: unboxed pots show 'X left to max' (e.g. 'Potion of Defense ... 14 left to max'); when a stat is maxed, further pots auto-route to POTION STORAGE ('You're already maxed. Potion of X sent to your potion storage!'). POTION STORAGE AUTO-SELL: when storage is full, excess auto-sells for fame ('Potion Storage Full! Potion of Vitality sold for 2 fame!'). MULTI-PERSONA ANNOUNCERS corroborated: Modnus, Mommy, Loot Notifier (event spawns/defeats: Firebreather, Cube God). No boss taunts/attack patterns (grind run).
uncertain: No boss taunts (crate/potion grind, not a boss-fight video). Crate-item names (Orb of Sweet Demise, Seal of the Enchanted Forest) read off fast unbox lines — spellings approximate. Attack patterns not classifiable (sparse grey-room bossends). Grey dungeon not name-identified.
confidence: LOW for bosses/attacks (grind video, no taunts, base/event bosses only). MEDIUM-HIGH for ECONOMY SYSTEMS intel — the crate→stat-pot→Potion-Storage(auto-sell) loop with 'X left to max' tracking is clearly documented and is genuine ROTF progression mechanics. Map MEDIUM (open realm + grey dungeon). Not a source of new buildable bosses.
